description.en: Our flagship formula engineered for Ethiopia's toughest stains. Ultra Blue penetrates deep into fabric fibers, removing grease, mud, and organic stains while leaving a fresh, long-lasting clean.
description.am: ለኢትዮጵያ ጠንካራ ቆሻሻ የተዘጋጀ ዋና ቀመራችን። ኡልትራ ብሉ ወደ ጨርቅ ፋይበር ውስጥ ዘልቆ ይገባል፣ ቅባት፣ ጭቃ እና ሌላ ቆሻሻ ያስወግዳል።

description.en: Infused with real lemon extracts, this formula cuts through kitchen grease and bathroom grime effortlessly. The antibacterial properties protect your family while the vibrant citrus scent freshens your space.
description.am: በትክክለኛ የሎሚ ሀረጎች የተቀመመ፣ ይህ ቀመር የኩሽና ቅባትን እና የመታጠቢያ ቤት ቆሻሻን በቀላሉ ያቋርጣል።

description.en: Specially designed for white and light-colored fabrics. White Power restores brightness and removes yellowing with an advanced optical brightener technology, keeping your whites gleaming.
description.am: ለነጭ እና ለቀለል ያሉ ጨርቆች በተለይ የተዘጋጀ። ዋይት ፓወር ብሩህነትን ያድሳል እና ቢጫነትን ያስወግዳል።

description.en: Transform dull floors into gleaming surfaces with Floor Shine. Works on tiles, marble, ceramic, and concrete. The non-slip formula ensures safety while the eucalyptus scent creates a spa-like atmosphere.
description.am: ደብዛዛ ወለሎችን ወደ አብሪ ወለሎች ይቀይሩ። ሸራ፣ እብነ በረድ፣ ሴራሚክ እና ኮንክሪት ላይ ይሰራል።

description.en: Concentrated dish-washing liquid that battles the greasiest pots and pans. Just a few drops create rich lather that powers through burnt food and oil residue. Gentle on hands, tough on grime.
description.am: ለዘይታማ ድስቶች እና ድስቶች የሚታገል ማጎሪያ የምግብ ዕቃ ማጠቢያ ፈሳሽ። ጥቂት ጠብታዎች ብቻ ለሸጎጦ ምግብ ኃይል ይሰጣል።

description.en: Hypoallergenic formula for delicate baby clothes and sensitive skin. Free from harsh chemicals, bleach, and artificial fragrances. Dermatologist tested and pediatrician approved for peace of mind.
description.am: ለስስ የሕጻናት ልብሶች እና ስሜታዊ ቆዳ ሃይፖአለርጂኒክ ቀመር። ከጠንካራ ኬሚካሎች እና ሰው ሰራሽ ሽቶ ነጻ።
